title: The Giants Rush Toward Crisis
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Robin, Unknown person #7, Usopp, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Aaah... Can you hear me, Elbaf?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you're... in love with me?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to kill yourself or what?! Your feelings touch me, but I don't want to follow you to the AF- TerLife!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Robin?! What is she doing now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: idiot! Did she plan to drag him down too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I know per-fectly that you're im- mortal...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And that you're a thorn- Man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If those damn invisible-ble thorns disappear, we can save the kids!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you thought that by throw- ing me off the cliff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'd put the kids out of reach of my power?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So classy, Robin! I've got goose- bumps all over!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn! Even a knife can't cut these ropes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means we'll also have to deal with that girl to get out of here?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
